reference: Recently, I have developed puffiness below my eyes and an irregular heartbeat. Since November twenty-nine, I have ceased taking my fifty micrograms of thyroxine, as a blood test showed my Thyroid Stimulating Hormone indicated it was too much at this time. My weight is also creeping up, having gained five kilograms in the past twelve months. I feel quite lethargic, though I guess this is because I sleep badly.
text: Recently, I have developed puffiness below my eyes and an irregular heartbeat. Since November 29, I have ceased taking my 50 micrograms of thyroxin as a blood test showed my thyroid-stimulating hormone indicated it was too much at this time. My weight is also creeping up, having 5 kilograms in the past 12 months. I feel quite lethargic, though I guess this is because I sleep badly.
